commit.subject: LU-19803 kernel: update RHEL 8.10 [4.18.0-553.94.1.el8_10]
commit.message:
LU-19803 kernel: update RHEL 8.10 [4.18.0-553.94.1.el8_10]

Update RHEL 8.10 kernel to 4.18.0-553.94.1.el8_10.
